article_title: Saudi Arabia's Savvy Games Group Acquires Mobile Legends Developer Moonton From ByteDance for $6 Billion

content_preview.title: Saudi Arabia's Savvy Games Group Acquires Mobile Legends Developer Moonton From ByteDance for $6 Billion
content_preview.summary: The deal ranks among the largest gaming acquisitions ever, giving the Saudi sovereign wealth fund's gaming arm control of one of mobile esports' most popular titles and extending its reach across publishing, mobile, PC, and esports infrastructure.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Saudi Arabia's Savvy Games Group has agreed to acquire Moonton Technology from ByteDance for more than $6 billion, according to [Bloomberg](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-20/bytedance-agrees-to-sell-moonton-to-savvy-games-for-6-billion). The deal, announced on March 20, ranks among the six largest video game acquisitions of all time and gives the Public Investment Fund's gaming subsidiary direct ownership of Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, one of the most-played mobile e...
